raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad aifgahje Mardaka-
jus/ un darrija wiſſu/ ko Eſtere
winnam bjt pawehlejſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta V. Nodalla.
Eſtere eet pee ta Kehnina: 1. Atrohd pee ta
paſcha Schehlaſtibu: 2. Luhds winnu ar
Amannus Dſihrehm: 4. Pahr fo Amans
lepoojahs: 9. Un leef Narratawas patai-
fiht/ to Mardakaju pee tahm pakahrt: 14.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad aptehrpahs Eſtere
treſcha Deena kehnin-
giski/ un ſtahweja eekich
ta Kehnixa Namma Pagalinja/
tam Kehnixa Nammam pretti/
un tas Kehninisch fehdcja uſtauu
Walſtibas Kreſſln eekich ta Keh-
nixa Namma / tahm Namma
Durwin pretti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tas Kehninisch Eſte-
ri to Kehnininn redſeja Pagal-
ma ſtahwin/ Dabbuja ta Scheh-
laſtibu preekſch winna Azzim.
Ta ka tas Kehninisch to ſelta
Szepteri/ kas winna Rohka bi-
ja Eſterei peetneedſe / un Eſtere
pergahje/ un aiſkahre ta Szepte-
ra Gallu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tazzija tas Kehninisch
us winnu: Kaß tew kait Kehni-
ninne Eſtere? jeb ko praſſi tu?
ir ta weena Puſſe tahs Walſti-
bas taps tew dohta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tazzija Eſtere: Ja tas
tam Kehninam patihk/ tad grih-
betu tas Kehninſch un Amans
ſchodcen nahet us tahm Dſih-
rehm/ ko es winnam efnut fa-
taiſiſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai Amans ſtedſahs/ un da-
vehz Eſteres Wahrdn. Kad
tas Kehninisch un Amans
tahm Dſihrehm nahze/ ko Eſt-
bij fataiſiſti:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sazzija tas Kehninisch
Eſteri Wiſnu dſerkohſt: Ko
luhds? tas taps tew dohts/
ko praſſi tu? tad tam buhs ni-
tikt/ ir lihds puts Walſtibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Eſtere/
tazzija: Manna Luhgſchana
manns Praſſſchana irr:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja es Schehlaſtibu eſi-
atradduſi preekſch ta Kehnin-
nu ja tas tam Kehninam papre-
tam irr mannu Luhgſchannu mi-
doht/ un darriht/ ko es praſſiſch-
tad lai tas Kehninisch un Ama-
nahk us tahm Dſihrehm / ko
teem fataiſiſchu / tad darriſe-
es rihtu pehz ta Kehnixa Wahrd-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tſgahje Amans
Deena lihgſinis un ar lab-
Prahtu. Bet kad Amans
Mardakaju redſeja eekſch ta K-
nina Wahrtim / ka tas ne ſo-
lahs/ un preekſch winna ne lo-
zijahs/ tad tappe Amans pi-
Bahrsibas prett Mardakaju/
meir winſch pahrzeete to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nahze us ſawu Na-
mu/ un winſch fuhtrija/ un li-
fawus Draugus nahet lihds
Seerefu ſawu Seeiu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Amans teize teem
Gohdu ſawas Baggatibas /
to Puſſn ſawo Dehlu/ un win-
ſekſch ka tas Kehninisch winnu
pa-au
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
